name: triager
description: Scans unlabeled open GitHub Issues, classifies each as kind:impl or kind:consider, assigns a unique order:N work-order label, and applies both labels via gh CLI.

limit.description: Maximum number of issues to triage in one run

workflow.description: Path to the downstream workflow JSON used to derive the label taxonomy (labelMapping keys + prioritizer.labels). Issues already carrying any of these labels are considered already-triaged and skipped.
